name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.FallOverWallHelper.LeaningAngleThreshold
summary: Maximum angle in degrees (between the vertical vector and a vector from pelvis to lower neck) to start to apply forces and torques to fall over the wall.
remarks:
Default value = 180.0f.
            Min value = 0.0f.
            Max value = 180.0f.
